summary: Iteration 28 - USSD Carbon Calculator (*144*88#) Testing. ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 10/10 API tests passed. Frontend: 5/5 UI tests passed. Verified: API with empty text returns Q1, full flow (5*48*1*2*2*1*1*1) returns result with score 7.5/10 and 158 FCFA/kg, invalid answer handling, partial flow, frontend phone simulator, 8-question flow, result display, restart button. Home page and Marketplace (12 products) still work correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend ussd.py: Stateless USSD parsing implemented correctly - parses accumulated 'text' field with '*' separator
Backend: Carbon premium calculation uses proper scoring formula (4.0 base + tree density bonus + practice bonuses/penalties)
Frontend USSDCarbonCalculator.jsx: Phone simulator design with proper data-testid attributes for testing
Frontend: Session management with textHistory accumulation matches USSD protocol
API returns appropriate error messages for invalid inputs while keeping session active
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 28 tested NEW USSD Carbon Calculator feature (*144*88#). Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_ussd_carbon_calculator.py cover: empty text=Q1, full flow result, partial flow, invalid answer handling, all 3 cultures (cacao/cafe/anacarde), low score non-eligibility, step progression. Frontend tests verified: page loads with phone simulator at /farmer/prime-carbone, 'Composer *144*88#' starts session, 8 questions flow through correctly, result shows Score, FCFA/kg, culture, prime annuelle, 'Recalculer ma prime' button restarts session. USSD gateway is MOCKED (simulated, not connected to real telco).
